# Documents

> Auto-generated from `/api/mcp/schema`. Run `dai sync` to regenerate.

## Tools

### `find_pdf_media` — Find PDF Pages / Images

Find extracted pages or embedded images from a PDF. Use this AFTER the user has run Extract Pages / Extract Images on a PDF. Pick your render strategy based on user intent:
- Single image: user asks for "the cover", "page 3", "the boat on page 5", a specific named item → return 1 item, render inline as a large image.
- Carousel: user asks for "all the boats", "every page", "a summary of the catalog", comparison requests → return N items, render as a horizontal MiniActivityCard carousel.
In your response, reference the image directly by its /api/documents/:id/download URL or use @[doc:id|title|imageUrl] mention so the client renders it inline.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `documentId` | string | yes | Parent PDF Document id |
| `kind` | string | no | Filter: "pages" for page renders, "images" for embedded images, omit for both |
| `pageNumber` | number | no | Filter to a specific page number |
| `limit` | number | no | Max items to return (default 20) |
